mapper.select: select albums.id ,album_name ,albums.create_date_time ,count(photos.album_id) as photos_album_id from albums left join `groups` on group_id = groups.id left join `photos` on albums.id = photos.album_id where group_id = #{groupId} group by albums.id ,album_name ,albums.create_date_time ,photos.album_id;
select count(*) from albums left join `groups` on group_id = groups.id where group_id = #{groupId}
select groups.account_id from albums left join `groups` on group_id = groups.id where albums.id = #{albumId}
